summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of AIthusiast platform. Backend API tests: 17/17 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests: All critical user flows passed. AI Search feature (Gemini 2.5 Flash) is working perfectly with intelligent recommendations and reasoning. All 54 tools, 12 articles, and 6 stacks are properly seeded and accessible.

additional_notes.llm_performance: Gemini 2.5 Flash is responding in 5-15 seconds as expected. All test queries returned source='llm' with intelligent recommendations and reasoning.
additional_notes.data_seeding: All seed data is properly loaded: 54 tools, 12 articles, 6 stacks, 10 categories.
additional_notes.critical_feature_status: AI Search (the core feature) is working perfectly with LLM-powered recommendations, intent detection, and ranked results.
additional_notes.ui_quality: Premium futuristic design is well-implemented with proper spacing, contrast, and visual hierarchy.
additional_notes.testability: All critical UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for automated testing.
additional_notes.no_mocked_apis: All APIs are real and functional. No mocked endpoints.
additional_notes.emergent_llm_key: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is properly configured and working (sk-emergent-5EcC16488Fd6b7a369)
